positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical depiction of a radiant cosmic forest at twilight. The forest features massive, bioluminescent flora with clean, geometric silhouettes and glowing energy tendrils. Include constellations woven through the branches and soft, abstract planetary rings orbiting the central subject. The color palette should use deep indigo, vibrant cerulean blue, soft lavender, and touches of neon gold for contrast. The composition must be centrally focused and designed as a seamless repeating pattern element suitable for apparel. Style: Mid-century modern mystical science-fiction meets Art Deco symmetry. Highly detailed, crisp vector quality, clean linework, cinematic lighting, strong contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, grainy, signature, text, watermark, logo, username, busy background, messy, bad anatomy, malformed hands, extra limbs, distorted, poor detail
